title: Glowing Caves
description: Everyone is suffering from the dark and that includes you too. This mod not only fixes this problem, but also adds glowing grass which spawns in a new cave biome glowing caves!
body:
Dive into the mysterious depths of Minecraft with the Glowing Caves Biome! 
  Explore vast underground caverns illuminated by radiant, bioluminescent flora and shimmering crystal formations. Wander through winding tunnels where glowing mushrooms, luminescent vines, and sparkling mineral veins light your path.
   Beware—though breathtaking, the biome is home to unique underground creatures and hidden treasures. Perfect for adventurers and builders alike, the Glowing Caves Biome transforms every spelunking expedition into a magical journey. Why is the file you download named flavor? Beacuse it adds 
a glowing flavor to the caves.
